name: Cellebrite DI Ltd.
description: Cellebrite DI Ltd. is an Israel-based provider of digital intelligence solutions for public and private sectors. The company's platform enables organizations to master the complexities of legally sanctioned digital investigations by streamlining intelligence processes. Cellebrite's technology helps law enforcement, military, intelligence, and enterprise customers collect, review, analyze, and manage digital data from various sources, including mobile devices, computers, and cloud services, to resolve investigations more quickly and efficiently.
